en_title: Maverick Games’ New Open-World Driving Game Will Be Revealed in Under 12 Hours
cn_title: 《极限竞速：地平线5》前总监新作即将揭晓
subtitle: 倒计时最后冲刺
opus_summary: 由《极限竞速：地平线5》前创意总监Mike Brown创立的独立工作室Maverick Games，将于6月2日伦敦时间上午11点（北京时间18点）正式公布其全新AAA开放世界动作驾驶游戏。过去一周，团队在位于利明顿温泉的工作室内一辆改装菲亚特Multipla中进行了倒计时直播，并陆续放出少量截图和线索。今年早些时候，亚马逊退出了该游戏的发行合作，但Brown迅速确认开发未受影响，游戏仍将如期公布。Maverick Games成立于2022年，由多位前Playground Games核心成员组成，包括制作人Tom Butcher、技术总监Matt Craven等，项目定位为“面向主机和PC的优质开放世界游戏”。

paragraphs.en: Independent studio Maverick Games, founded by former Forza Horizon 5 creative director Mike Brown, will finally be revealing its new AAA open-world action-driving game on June 2, at 11am London BST (6am EDT / 3am PDT / 8pm AEST).
paragraphs.cn: 由《极限竞速：地平线5》前创意总监Mike Brown创立的独立工作室Maverick Games，将于6月2日伦敦夏令时上午11点（美国东部时间6点/太平洋时间3点/澳大利亚东部时间晚8点，即北京时间18点）正式公布其全新AAA开放世界动作驾驶游戏。

paragraphs.en: The Maverick Games team has been hosting a countdown livestream over the past week from within a modified Fiat Multipla that has been placed inside the Leamington Spa-based studio. The team has revealed a small series of screenshots to date, along with several clues relating to possible features and a potential location.
paragraphs.cn: 过去一周，Maverick Games团队在位于利明顿温泉的工作室内，通过一辆改装过的菲亚特Multipla进行了倒计时直播。团队至今已放出少量截图，以及一些关于可能的功能和潜在场景的线索。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this year, Amazon backed out of the publishing deal it had with Maverick Games for its untitled racer . Fortunately, this didn’t prove to be the end of the road for the project, with Brown quickly confirming on social media that development was continuing to progress strongly and that the game’s announcement was still coming.
paragraphs.cn: 今年早些时候，亚马逊退出了与Maverick Games就这款未命名赛车游戏达成的发行协议。幸运的是，这并未成为项目的终点——Brown迅速在社交媒体上确认，开发仍在强劲推进，游戏仍将如期公布。

paragraphs.en: Maverick Games was founded in 2022 following the departure of a number of staff from Forza Horizon developer Playground Games. At that time, former Forza Horizon 5 creative director Mike Brown was joined by producer Tom Butcher, technical director Matt Craven, technical art director Gareth Harwood, audio director Fraser Stachan, and art director Ben Penrose. It was revealed in January 2023 that the team was working on a “premium open-world game for consoles and PC.”
paragraphs.cn: Maverick Games成立于2022年，当时多位员工离开了《极限竞速：地平线》开发商Playground Games。前《极限竞速：地平线5》创意总监Mike Brown与制作人Tom Butcher、技术总监Matt Craven、技术美术总监Gareth Harwood、音频总监Fraser Stachan以及美术总监Ben Penrose共同组建了这家工作室。2023年1月，团队透露他们正在开发一款「面向主机和PC的优质开放世界游戏」。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。你可以在Bluesky上通过@mrlukereilly找到他，向他询问各种事情。
